text:
To be covered, the services must 
be reasonable and necessary skilled nursing care and must be performed under the 
general supervision of a registered or licensed nurse. The supervising nurse need not 
accompany the student nurse on each visit. All documentation requirements must be 
fulfilled by student nurses. 

40.1.2.15 - Psychiatric Evaluation, Therapy, and Teaching 
(Rev. 12425; Issued: 12-21-23: Effective: 01-01-24; Implementation: 01-02-24) 

The evaluation, psychotherapy, and teaching
